patches.rationale: WIN-019.c4 curmudgeon: internal rounding inconsistency. The c3-verified higher-precision value is ~6.69 (not 6.48), which chains correctly: 6.69/2.56 ≈ 2.61 = area-to-perimeter. The rounded value 6.48/2.56 = 2.53, contradicting the stated 2.61 area-to-perimeter ratio. Fix to 6.69 (+151%) maintains internal consistency.

patches.replace: to three significant figures (two decimal places)
patches.rationale: WIN-019.c4 curmudgeon: 2.66 has three significant figures (digits 2, 6, 6), not two. The interval arithmetic (2.655–2.665, ±0.19%) is already correct; only the label is wrong. Corrected to 'three significant figures (two decimal places)'.

patches.find: which on this analemma includes height, perimeter, area-to-perimeter
patches.replace: which on this analemma includes perimeter and area-to-perimeter (alongside the gear ratio itself)
patches.rationale: WIN-019.c4 curmudgeon: MAJOR factual error. Height (2.25) deviates from 2.66 by -15.4%, which is well outside 5%. The review's own table lists this. Within-5% set is {perimeter (-3.8%), area-to-perimeter (-1.9%), gear ratio (+0.25%)}. Height must be removed from this list.

patches.find: The value 2.66 does not correspond to any measurable geometric property of the analemma (lobe height ratio ≈ 2.25, width ratio ≈ 3.01, area ratio ≈ 6.48) and appears to be a spirograph gear-ratio parameter
patches.replace: The value 2.66 does not correspond to any measurable geometric property of the analemma (no standard ratio matches 2.66 to the implied three-significant-figure precision: height 2.25, width 3.01, area 6.69, perimeter 2.56, area-to-perimeter 2.61) and appears to be a spirograph gear-ratio parameter
patches.rationale: WIN-019.c4 curmudgeon: verdict-evidence drift. detail_verdict_text cherry-picks only height/width/area, reopening the perimeter loophole that EXP-185 closed in evidence. Updated to include all five ratios including perimeter (2.56) and area-to-perimeter (2.61), consistent with EXP-185's evidence table. Area ratio updated to 6.69 for consistency.

patches.find: the lobe height ratio is ~2.25, the width ratio is ~3.01
patches.replace: no standard lobe ratio (height ~2.25, width ~3.01, perimeter ~2.56) matches 2.66 to the implied precision
patches.rationale: WIN-019.c4 curmudgeon: TLDR cherry-picks by mentioning only height and width, omitting perimeter (the closest-matching ratio). Updated to include perimeter, consistent with evidence and verdict.
